Deployment Pipeline

1
Infrastructure
PostgreSQL, Redis, MinIO, MongoDB, Uptime Kuma
2
Phase 1A
Commerce, Fleet, CRM, IAM — 10 services
3
Phase 1B
IoT, AI, Education, Health — 8 services
4
Phase 1C
Marketing, Platform, Security — 8 services

First-Time Setup

1
Generate secrets
Creates .env with unique keys — run once
2
Start infrastructure
PostgreSQL + Redis + MinIO + MongoDB + monitoring
3
Initialize databases
Done automatically by init-databases.sh on first boot
4
Launch Phase 1A
Commerce, Fleet, CRM, IAM — the core stack
